use_cases: Form submission triggers with configurable variants
Interactive UI controls with size and variant options
Accessible button composition using Radix UI Slot
ai_summary: A reusable React button component with configurable variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility and class-variance-authority for consistent Tailwind-based styling. Provides standard focus-visible ring styling and disabled states out of the box.
